competitors.raw_snapshot: OpenAI June 14, 2026: GPT-5.2 模型系列（GPT-5.2 Instant、GPT-5.2 Thinking、GPT-5.2 Pro）已于 June 12 退役，存量对话自动迁移至对应 GPT-5.5 模型。GPT-5.3 Instant 小更新：改善跟进对话语气，减少 teaser 式回答风格。ChatGPT Memory 增强：自动更新机制、更实用的个性化，Plus/Pro 用户存储容量翻倍，从美国开始逐步推出。Aria 超级应用（ChatGPT + Codex + agents + Canva/Figma/Spotify 等集成）：仍处于「数周内上线」预告阶段，未正式发布。Active sessions 安全功能：Settings > Security 可查看/退出未识别 session。（来源：WebSearch，非官方原文）
competitors.content_hash: OpenAI June 14, 2026: GPT-5.2 模型系列（GPT-5.2 Instant、GPT-5.2 Thinking、GPT-5.2 Pro）已于 June 12 退役，存量对话自动迁移至对应 GPT-5.5 模型。GPT-5.3 Instan

changes.description: GPT-5.2 系列全面退役（June 12，baseline 遗漏）：GPT-5.2 Instant/Thinking/Pro 下线，现有对话自动迁移至 GPT-5.5 对应版本
changes.evidence: 「As of June 12, 2026, GPT-5.2 models are no longer available in ChatGPT, including GPT-5.2 Instant, GPT-5.2 Thinking, and GPT-5.2 Pro; existing conversations will automatically continue on the corresponding GPT-5.5 model」

changes.description: ChatGPT Memory 容量翻倍（Plus/Pro）：自动更新机制、存储容量提升 2x，个性化更实用，从美国开始逐步推出
changes.evidence: 「ChatGPT upgrades memory to keep context fresher and responses more relevant, with automatic updates, more useful personalization, and twice the memory capacity for Plus and Pro users, with the rollout starting in the US」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session 记忆容量增加，强化持久化 context 层——但仍为 snapshot 式 memory，非 live artifact pull

key_findings: GPT-5.2 系列退役（June 12）：全面迁移到 GPT-5.5，OpenAI 模型代际更迭加速，能力基线持续提升
Memory 容量翻倍（Plus/Pro）：跨 session 个性化记忆增强；Aria 超级应用仍未发布，仍处于预告阶段

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch:Claude credit overhaul June 15 2026 pricing changes plans
WebSearch:Claude connector observability Claude Code workflows subagents June 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot: Anthropic June 14, 2026: 【明日生效】Agent SDK 独立计费 Credit Pool（June 15 起）——Agent SDK、claude -p、GitHub Actions、第三方 Agent 应用（OpenClaw/Conductor/Zed/Jean 等）从订阅使用量 pool 独立到专属 Credit pool；按标准 API token 费率计费，月末不累积；Pro $20/month，Max 5x $100/month，Max 20x $200/month；交互式 Claude.ai chat 和 Claude Code terminal/IDE 不受影响。Connector Observability（June 8，public beta）：MCP connector dashboard 显示 active users、total tool calls、error rate/latency、per-tool 拆解、directory rank；connector owner 可在 Claude app 内直接提交 directory；已在 baseline 遗漏（June 8 发布）。（来源：WebSearch，非官方原文）
competitors.content_hash: Anthropic June 14, 2026: 【明日生效】Agent SDK 独立计费 Credit Pool（June 15 起）——Agent SDK、claude -p、GitHub Actions、第三方 Agent 应用（OpenClaw/Conductor/Zed/Jean

changes.description: Agent SDK 独立计费 Credit Pool 明日（June 15）生效：所有 programmatic/autonomous 使用移出订阅 pool，按 API 费率独立计费；Pro $20/月，Max 5x $100/月，Max 20x $200/月，不累积
changes.evidence: 「Starting June 15, 2026, Claude Code's programmatic usage will move to a dedicated credit pool billed at full API rates, ending the previous model where usage was bundled into your subscription tier... The Agent SDK, the claude -p command, Claude Code GitHub Actions, and all third-party Agent applications will be removed from the existing subscription usage pool and migrated to a brand-new, independently billed 'Agent SDK Credit pool'」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：若 meee2 使用 Claude Agent SDK 或 claude -p 构建 agent workflow，明日起运行成本结构将改变——Max 5x 计划 $100/月 credit 在密集 agent 使用下可能快速耗尽；需评估 meee2 agent 运营成本模型

changes.description: Connector Observability public beta（June 8，baseline 遗漏）：MCP connector dashboard 显示跨 Claude 产品的 active users、tool calls、error rate/latency；connector owner 可在 Claude app 内直接提交 directory
changes.evidence: 「Published connectors in the directory now have a dashboard showing how they're performing across Claude product surfaces. Connector owners can monitor active users, total tool calls, and directory rank over time, see health score, error rates, and latency at a glance with per-tool error breakdowns」

key_findings: 【时效紧迫】Agent SDK Credit Pool 明日（June 15）生效：programmatic 使用移出订阅 pool，Pro $20/月、Max 5x $100/月、Max 20x $200/月——meee2 若使用 Claude Agent SDK 构建 agent 流程需立即评估成本影响
Connector Observability public beta（baseline 遗漏，June 8）：MCP connector 性能监控入 Claude app，Anthropic 构建 connector 生态基础设施

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
fetched_urls: WebSearch:GitHub Copilot new features June 14 2026 agent session update
WebSearch:GitHub Copilot Canvases agent work June 2026 new feature
competitors.raw_snapshot: GitHub Copilot June 14, 2026: Copilot App（June 8-9，baseline 遗漏，technical preview）——专用桌面应用，「agent-native desktop experience」；Canvases：「bidirectional work surfaces for humans and agents」，agent 持续更新 canvas，开发者在同一 surface 上编辑/重排/批准/重定向 agent 工作；canvas 可显示 plan、PR、browser session、terminal、deployment、dashboard、workflow 状态；已扩展至所有 Pro/Pro+/Business/Enterprise 用户（Windows/Mac/Linux）；My Work 仪表板统一追踪跨 repo 工作进度；可同时管理多个活跃 agent（修 bug 的/建功能的/处理 PR 的并行运行）。已在 Session Search（June 10）、/chronicle 之上构建完整 agent 工作台。（来源：WebSearch，非官方原文）
competitors.content_hash: GitHub Copilot June 14, 2026: Copilot App（June 8-9，baseline 遗漏，technical preview）——专用桌面应用，「agent-native desktop experience」；Canvases：「bidirectional work

changes.description: Copilot App + Canvases（June 8-9，baseline 遗漏）：专用桌面 agent 工作台，Canvases 为「人与 agent 的双向工作 surface」——agent 实时更新 canvas，开发者在同一 surface 检查/引导/批准 agent 工作
changes.evidence: 「Canvases are bidirectional work surfaces for humans and agents. The agent updates the canvas as it works, and you can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect work directly on that same surface. A canvas can display a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2+#3：Canvases = agent 实时更新的 live work surface（非 snapshot），开发者与 agent 在同一 canvas 上协同 = descriptive canvas where flow emerges from real action。这是 GitHub 对「人机共享 canvas」的首个完整实现，直接触碰 meee2 核心差异化定义

key_findings: 【重大 baseline 遗漏】Copilot Canvases（June 8-9）：「人与 agent 的双向工作 surface」——agent 持续更新 canvas，开发者在同一 surface 上实时引导，canvas 显示 plan/PR/browser session/terminal/deployment——这是 GitHub Copilot 迄今最接近 meee2 descriptive canvas 概念的完整实现
Copilot App 建立完整 agent 工作台：Canvases + Session Search + /chronicle + agent logs + My Work 仪表板，agent session 工作台生态成型

alerts.headline: Copilot Canvases（baseline 遗漏，June 8-9）：「人与 agent 的双向工作 surface」——agent 实时更新 canvas，开发者在同一 surface 检查/引导/批准，直接触碰 meee2 descriptive canvas 锚点
alerts.evidence: 「Canvases are bidirectional work surfaces for humans and agents. The agent updates the canvas as it works, and you can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect work directly on that same surface. A canvas can display a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state」
alerts.action_suggestion: GitHub Copilot Canvases 是迄今最直接触碰 meee2「descriptive canvas + live artifact」差异化锚点的竞品实现：agent 持续更新 canvas（live，非 snapshot），人在同一 surface 上引导（descriptive-first）。当前差异：Copilot canvas 限于编码/PR 工作流（coding-centric），缺少跨工具/跨 owner 维度。建议明确 meee2 canvas 在「跨工具 live link」和「非 coding 场景」的差异化叙事，并加速可视化 demo 发布
